definition: To cease resistance and submit; to yield a free people's future.
example: We shall fight on the beaches, we shall fight on the landing grounds; we shall never surrender.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: Exhausting labor undertaken for a hard cause.
example: I have nothing to offer but blood, toil, tears and sweat—the honest ledger of a nation at war.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: Courage in pain or adversity; steady moral strength.
example: Blood, toil, tears and sweat named the price; fortitude named the character that would pay it.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: Open resistance; bold disobedience in the face of threat.
example: Defiance rang through the promise to fight on the beaches and never surrender.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: Firm determination to act despite fear or fatigue.
example: In war: resolution. In defeat: defiance. In victory: magnanimity—resolve in every tense of the struggle.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: Generosity of spirit, especially toward a defeated opponent.
example: In war: resolution. In defeat: defiance. In victory: magnanimity. In peace: goodwill.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The action or state of keeping careful watch for possible danger.
example: From Stettin in the Baltic to Trieste in the Adriatic an iron curtain fell—and vigilance became the price of free nations.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The fact or power of enduring an unpleasant or difficult process or situation without giving way
example: Endurance is the hinge of We Shall Fight on the Beaches: without it the rest is decoration.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

example: We shall not fail or falter; we shall not weaken or tire. Neither the sudden shock of battle, nor the long-drawn trials of vigilance and exertion will wear us down.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

example: Triumph is the hinge of We Shall Fight on the Beaches: without it the rest is decoration.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The ability to do something that frightens one; bravery
example: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: A collection of weapons and military equipment
example: We must be the great arsenal of democracy.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: A system of government by the whole population or all the eligible members of a state
example: We must be the great arsenal of democracy.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The action of pacifying or placating someone by acceding to their demands
example: No man can tame a tiger into a kitten by stroking it. There can be no appeasement with ruthlessness.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The quality of being cruel or having no pity
example: No man can tame a tiger into a kitten by stroking it. There can be no appeasement with ruthlessness.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The point in time or space at which something starts
example: This is not the end. It is not even the beginning of the end. But it is, perhaps, the end of the beginning.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: An act of defeating an enemy or opponent in a battle, game, or other competition
example: Victory at all costs, victory in spite of all terror, victory however long and hard the road may be; for without victory, there is no survival.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

definition: The state or fact of continuing to live or exist, typically in spite of an accident, ordeal, or difficult circumstances
example: Victory at all costs, victory in spite of all terror, victory however long and hard the road may be; for without victory, there is no survival.
source: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches

example: He summoned an indomitable will: we shall never surrender.
speech: We Shall Fight on the Beaches
